metrics.tokens_per_second: Decoded tokens / wall-clock generation time (s), measured per prompt and averaged across runs.
metrics.ttft_ms: Time to first token: ms from prompt submission to the first decoded token (prefill latency).
metrics.tpot_ms: Time per output token: average inter-token latency during the decode phase.
metrics.verdict: One of: 'Excellent' (>=20 tps), 'Good' (>=10), 'Usable' (>=4), 'Slow' (>=1), 'Unusable' (<1) — applied to avg_tps across the suite.

procedure.warmup: First run per prompt is discarded as warmup when computing averages.
procedure.concurrent: Spawns N parallel generate() calls and measures wall-clock total throughput.
procedure.multi_turn: Each turn re-formats full conversation; measures context-accumulation overhead.
procedure.long_context: Prepends a ~300 word technical passage to the prompt; isolates prefill scaling.
